requirement_topic.en: Battery cell and module safety — UL 1973 / UL 1642 for stationary ESS applications
requirement_topic.zh: 电池单体与模组安全——固定式储能系统UL 1973 / UL 1642认证要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電池單體與模組安全——固定式儲能系統UL 1973 / UL 1642認證要求

summary.en: UL 1973 (Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications) defines safety requirements for battery systems and modules used in stationary energy storage. UL 1642 (Standard for Lithium Batteries) covers the underlying cell-level safety tests. Evidence of UL 1973 and/or UL 1642 certification for cells and modules is required as a prerequisite for the system-level UL 9540 listing that most US jurisdictions and the NEC require for BESS installations.
summary.zh: UL 1973（固定式、车辆辅助电源及轻轨应用电池标准）规定了固定储能系统所用电池系统与模组的安全要求。UL 1642（锂电池标准）涵盖底层电芯级安全测试。电芯和模组须获得UL 1973和/或UL 1642认证，作为系统级UL 9540列名的前提条件——而UL 9540列名是美国大多数司法管辖区及NEC对储能系统安装的强制要求。
summary.zht: UL 1973（固定式、車輛輔助電源及輕軌應用電池標準）規定了固定儲能系統所用電池系統與模組的安全要求。UL 1642（鋰電池標準）涵蓋底層電芯級安全測試。電芯和模組須獲得UL 1973和/或UL 1642認證，作為系統級UL 9540列名的前提條件——而UL 9540列名是美國大多數司法管轄區及NEC對儲能系統安裝的強制要求。

standards_or_laws: UL 1973 (Edition 3, 2022) — Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power and Light Electric Rail Applications
UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (system-level listing, requires UL 1973/1642 evidence)
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems

summary.en: GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrochemical Energy Storage — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池) is the primary Chinese mandatory standard for stationary BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558 covers the overall electrochemical energy storage system technical requirements. Chinese cells certified under GB 36276 pass domestic grid-connection acceptance but this certification is not recognised by UL or accepted as equivalent evidence for UL 9540 system listings in the United States.
summary.zh: GB 36276-2023（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池安全要求）是中国固定式储能电芯与模组的主要强制性标准。GB/T 36558涵盖电化学储能系统整体技术要求。依据GB 36276取得认证的中国电芯可通过国内并网验收，但该认证不被UL认可，亦不被视为美国UL 9540系统列名的等效证明。
summary.zht: GB 36276-2023（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池安全要求）是中國固定式儲能電芯與模組的主要強制性標準。GB/T 36558涵蓋電化學儲能系統整體技術要求。依據GB 36276取得認證的中國電芯可通過國內並網驗收，但該認證不被UL認可，亦不被視為美國UL 9540系統列名的等效證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池安全要求 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34131 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for BMS in Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations)

gap.en: Critical gap: Chinese GB 36276 cell certification is not accepted as equivalent evidence for UL 1973 or UL 1642 by UL or US AHJs. Cells and modules destined for US BESS must be independently tested and listed to UL 1973 and/or UL 1642 by a NRTL (e.g. UL, Intertek, SGS). Without this, the integrator cannot obtain a UL 9540 system listing, which is required by NFPA 855 and most US state/local fire codes. There is no mutual recognition agreement between UL and Chinese certification bodies (CQC/CNCA) for this scope. As of mid-2026, OSHA recognises 21 NRTLs including UL LLC, Intertek, CSA Group, SGS North America, TUV Rheinland, TUV SUD, DEKRA, Bureau Veritas, Eurofins, and Element Materials Technology. No public bilateral bridging programme between UL/NRTL and Chinese certification bodies (CQC/CNCA) for UL 1973/1642 scope has been confirmed; full independent NRTL testing remains required.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国GB 36276电芯认证不被UL或美国权威机构（AHJ）认可为UL 1973或UL 1642的等效证明。拟出口美国储能系统的电芯及模组必须由NRTL独立测试并取得UL 1973和/或UL 1642列名。截至2026年中，OSHA认可的21家NRTL包括UL LLC、Intertek、CSA Group、SGS、TUV莱茵、TUV南德、DEKRA、Bureau Veritas、Eurofins及Element等。目前未确认UL/NRTL与中国认证机构（CQC/CNCA）之间在UL 1973/1642范围内存在公开双边桥接项目，须全程独立NRTL测试。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國GB 36276電芯認證不被UL或美國權威機構（AHJ）認可為UL 1973或UL 1642的等效證明。擬出口美國儲能系統的電芯及模組必須由NRTL獨立測試並取得UL 1973和/或UL 1642列名。截至2026年中，OSHA認可的21家NRTL包括UL LLC、Intertek、CSA Group、SGS、TUV萊茵、TUV南德、DEKRA、Bureau Veritas、Eurofins及Element等。目前未確認UL/NRTL與中國認證機構（CQC/CNCA）之間在UL 1973/1642範圍內存在公開雙邊橋接項目，須全程獨立NRTL測試。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory — UL 9540 system listing (which requires UL 1973/1642 cell evidence) is mandated by NFPA 855 and adopted by most US state and local fire codes; NEC Article 706 references the standard.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 36276-2023 is a mandatory national standard (强制性国家标准) enforced by SAMR/SAC for stationary BESS cells sold in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] Cells and modules manufactured to Chinese GB 36276 standards require separate UL 1973 and/or UL 1642 testing and listing by a US-recognised NRTL before they can support a UL 9540 system listing in the United States. GB certification alone does not satisfy this requirement. Early engagement with a NRTL is strongly recommended to identify any additional testing scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据中国GB 36276标准生产的电芯和模组，在美国须另行通过美国认可的NRTL机构的UL 1973和/或UL 1642测试与列名，方可支持UL 9540系统列名。单凭GB认证不能满足此要求。强烈建议尽早与NRTL机构接触，以确定额外测试范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據中國GB 36276標準生產的電芯和模組，在美國須另行通過美國認可的NRTL機構的UL 1973和/或UL 1642測試與列名，方可支持UL 9540系統列名。單憑GB認證不能滿足此要求。強烈建議盡早與NRTL機構接觸，以確定額外測試範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Management System (BMS) safety integration — UL 1973 module-level BMS requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电池管理系统（BMS）安全集成——UL 1973模组级BMS要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電池管理系統（BMS）安全整合——UL 1973模組級BMS要求

summary.en: UL 1973 includes requirements for the Battery Management System (BMS) as an integral part of the battery module or system under test. The BMS must demonstrate overvoltage, undervoltage, overcurrent, and thermal protection functions as part of the UL 1973 evaluation. The BMS firmware and hardware are considered in scope; changes to BMS firmware after listing may require re-evaluation. This is assessed at the module level, feeding upward into the UL 9540 system listing.
summary.zh: UL 1973将电池管理系统（BMS）作为被测电池模组或系统的组成部分纳入要求。BMS须在UL 1973评估中证明过压、欠压、过流及热保护功能。BMS固件与硬件均在评估范围内；列名后若更改BMS固件，可能需要重新评估。此评估在模组层面进行，并向上反映至UL 9540系统列名。
summary.zht: UL 1973將電池管理系統（BMS）作為被測電池模組或系統的組成部分納入要求。BMS須在UL 1973評估中證明過壓、欠壓、過流及熱保護功能。BMS固件與硬件均在評估範圍內；列名後若更改BMS固件，可能需要重新評估。此評估在模組層面進行，並向上反映至UL 9540系統列名。

standards_or_laws: UL 1973 (Edition 3, 2022) — Section covering BMS functional safety and protection requirements
UL 9540 — Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (system-level, references UL 1973 module listing)

UL 991 — Tests for Safety-Related Controls Employing Solid-State Devices (UL 1973 requires BMS hardware to be evaluated per UL 991; BMS software evaluated per UL 1998 — both are in-scope for UL 1973 module listing)

summary.en: GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations) specifies BMS requirements for stationary BESS in China, including cell-level monitoring, protection thresholds, and communication protocols. GB 36276-2023 also references BMS protection requirements at the module level. These Chinese BMS standards are not recognised as equivalent to the UL 1973 BMS evaluation for US market access.
summary.zh: GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）规定了中国固定储能BMS要求，包括电芯级监测、保护阈值及通信协议。GB 36276-2023在模组层面亦引用了BMS保护要求。上述中国BMS标准不被认可为美国市场准入的UL 1973 BMS评估等效依据。
summary.zht: GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）規定了中國固定儲能BMS要求，包括電芯級監測、保護閾值及通訊協議。GB 36276-2023在模組層面亦引用了BMS保護要求。上述中國BMS標準不被認可為美國市場準入的UL 1973 BMS評估等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for BMS in Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations)
GB 36276-2023 — BMS protection requirements referenced at module level

gap.en: Gap: BMS firmware and protection logic validated under GB/T 34131 must be re-evaluated under UL 1973 by a NRTL for US listings. BMS changes post-listing (e.g. firmware OTA updates) may trigger re-evaluation obligations under UL Follow-Up Services. Chinese manufacturers accustomed to GB-only validation often underestimate the scope and timeline of UL BMS re-evaluation. UL Follow-Up Services govern post-listing change control; manufacturers should establish a formal change-control procedure for post-listing firmware updates. No confirmed streamlined BMS delta-evaluation programme was found in public UL documentation as of mid-2026 — contact UL Follow-Up Services directly to assess scope.
gap.zh: 差距：依据GB/T 34131验证的BMS固件及保护逻辑，须由NRTL在UL 1973框架下重新评估，方可用于美国列名。列名后BMS的变更（如固件OTA升级）可能触发UL后续服务（Follow-Up Services）的重新评估义务。习惯于仅做GB验证的中国制造商往往低估UL BMS重新评估的范围与周期。截至2026年中，未在UL公开文件中发现简化BMS差异评估项目，建议直接联系UL后续服务确认范围。
gap.zht: 差距：依據GB/T 34131驗證的BMS固件及保護邏輯，須由NRTL在UL 1973框架下重新評估，方可用於美國列名。列名後BMS的變更（如固件OTA升級）可能觸發UL後續服務（Follow-Up Services）的重新評估義務。習慣於僅做GB驗證的中國製造商往往低估UL BMS重新評估的範圍與週期。截至2026年中，未在UL公開文件中發現簡化BMS差異評估項目，建議直接聯繫UL後續服務確認範圍。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory — BMS evaluation is an integral part of the UL 1973 module listing required for UL 9540 system listing; mandated by NFPA 855 and US state/local fire codes.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 34131-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国家标准) but BMS compliance with GB 36276 is mandatory for grid-connected stationary BESS in China under SAMR enforcement.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] BMS validation under Chinese GB/T 34131 does not substitute for UL 1973 BMS evaluation. Manufacturers exporting BESS to the US should plan for UL 1973 BMS re-evaluation as part of the listing process and establish a change-control procedure for post-listing firmware updates to avoid unplanned re-evaluations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据中国GB/T 34131进行的BMS验证不能替代UL 1973 BMS评估。向美国出口储能系统的制造商应将UL 1973 BMS重新评估纳入列名流程规划，并建立列名后固件更新的变更控制程序，以避免计划外的重新评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據中國GB/T 34131進行的BMS驗證不能替代UL 1973 BMS評估。向美國出口儲能系統的製造商應將UL 1973 BMS重新評估納入列名流程規劃，並建立列名後固件更新的變更控制程序，以避免計劃外的重新評估。
